bugs.title: Salary field data integrity issue: Table shows 0 instead of entered value
bugs.preconditions: User is on the registration page
reproductionSteps: 1. Fill all mandatory fields with valid data
4. Observe the 'Salario' column in the 'Empleados Registrados' table
bugs.expectedBehavior: The table should display '50000' in the Salario column.
bugs.actualBehavior: The table displays '0' in the Salario column.

bugs.title: Age validation bypass: Allows registration with age 17
bugs.reproducedBy: TC03: Validation - Age Out of Range - Too Young
bugs.preconditions: User is on the registration page
reproductionSteps: 1. Fill all mandatory fields with valid data
bugs.expectedBehavior: System should show an error message and prevent registration.
bugs.actualBehavior: System shows 'Empleado registrado exitosamente!' and adds the employee to the table with age 17.

bugs.title: Inconsistent validation state for age 66: Shows error but also success message
bugs.reproducedBy: TC04: Validation - Age Out of Range - Too Old
reproductionSteps: 2. Fill other fields and click 'Registrar Empleado'
bugs.expectedBehavior: Only an error message should be shown; no success message.
bugs.actualBehavior: Error message 'La edad debe estar entre 18 y 65 años' is shown, but also 'Empleado registrado exitosamente!'. Table is not updated.

bugs.title: Email validation bypass: Allows registration with invalid email format
reproductionSteps: 2. Fill other fields and click 'Registrar Empleado'
bugs.expectedBehavior: Error message should be shown and registration prevented.
bugs.actualBehavior: System shows 'Empleado registrado exitosamente!' and accepts the invalid email.

bugs.title: Table horizontal overflow on mobile devices
reproductionSteps: 1. Open the page on a mobile device (375px width)
2. Scroll down to the 'Empleados Registrados' table
bugs.expectedBehavior: Table should be responsive or scrollable within viewport.
bugs.actualBehavior: Table width is 1023px, causing significant horizontal overflow on 375px viewport.

bugs.title: Insufficient color contrast on 'Registrar Empleado' button
bugs.expectedBehavior: Contrast ratio should be at least 4.5:1.
bugs.actualBehavior: Contrast ratio is 3.13:1 (White text on Green #28a745 background).
